name: pnp-sharepoint-skills-style-glassmorphism
title: Style: Glassmorphism
shortDescription: Glassmorphism style tokens for the list-styling skill. Soft pill badges, no borders, thin bars, airy modern aesthetic.
longDescription: Glassmorphism style tokens for the list-styling skill. Soft pill badges with no borders, thin bars, and an airy modern aesthetic inspired by frosted-glass UI.
Use when the user says 'glassmorphism,' 'frosted glass,' 'glass look,' or 'soft modern.'

thumbnails.alt: Glassmorphism style applied to a SharePoint list

references.name: List Styling Engine
references.description: The companion skill that applies these style tokens to a SharePoint list.

references.name: Demo video
references.description: Walkthrough of the list-styling engine and supporting style token skills.
